title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Led the backend development of a medical Laboratary Information Management System (LIMS). Implemented auth for user roles, async pipeline for uploads, automated PDF summary generation, integrated caching mechaism, refactored DTO and DB queries. Implemented CI/CD workflows for faster deployments.

title: Technical Author
description: Author technical articles on Java, infrastructure, and Linux internals. Published 150+ articles for 12+ million readers on the platform worldwide. Conducted deep research on 2500+ on technical topics for 50+ authors. Ranked top 5% of contributors.

title: Backend Engineer
description: Worked on the backend of a mobile-first U.S. based consultation platform. Engineered microservices, refactored database schemas, optimized queries, and wrote technical documentations.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Developed full-stack solutions, achieving Top Rated status and 4.75/5 rating across 12+ projects. Worked solo on a basketball sports management platform covering features including player/stats management, play-by-play tracking, video compression, highlights generation from events, and adaptive playback.
